name_cn:
【M47074】Backup Blush Pink Backpack
Top-tier
Crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, this Backup Ys backpack features a subtle Monogram embossing. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer options for hand-carry or crossbody wear.
Size: 20 x 22 x 14 cm (Length x Height x Width)
